basic_01_inventory_cash.reason: Actual: Dr Inventory 100 / Cr Cash 100 matches expected Dr Inventories — Merchandise 100 / Cr Cash 100; account names are semantically equivalent.

basic_02_inventory_on_account.reason: Actual: Dr Inventory 300 / Cr Accounts Payable 300 matches expected Dr Inventories — Merchandise 300 / Cr Trade payables 300; account names are semantically equivalent.

basic_03_issue_stock_with_apic.reason: Actual: Dr Cash 180 / Cr Common Stock 100 / Cr Additional Paid-In Capital 80 matches expected; Common Stock = Share capital — Common, Additional Paid-In Capital = Additional paid-in capital.

basic_04_sell_inventory.reason: Actual: Dr Cash 500, Dr Cost of Goods Sold 300, Cr Sales Revenue 500, Cr Inventory 300 matches expected; all accounts are semantically equivalent and amounts match.

basic_05_pay_accounts_payable.reason: Actual: Dr Accounts Payable 50 / Cr Cash 50 matches expected Dr Trade payables 50 / Cr Cash 50; semantically equivalent.

basic_06_refinance_loan.reason: Actual: Dr Notes Payable - Old 100 / Cr Notes Payable - New 100 matches expected Dr Notes payable 100 / Cr Notes payable 100; same substance using old/new qualifiers.

basic_07_loan_to_equity.reason: Actual: Dr Bank Loan Payable 200 / Cr Common Shares 200 matches expected Dr Notes payable 200 / Cr Share capital — Common 200; Bank Loan Payable = Notes payable, Common Shares = Share capital — Common.

basic_08_deliver_service_against_deposit.reason: Actual: Dr Customer Deposits 100 / Cr Service Revenue 100 matches expected Dr Contract liabilities 100 / Cr Revenue — Product sales 100; Customer Deposits = Contract liabilities, Service Revenue = Revenue (acceptable wording difference).

basic_09_repurchase_stock.reason: Actual: Dr Treasury Stock 200 / Cr Cash 200 matches expected Dr Treasury shares 200 / Cr Cash 200; semantically equivalent.

basic_10_declare_dividend.reason: Actual: Dr Dividends 500000 / Cr Dividends Payable 500000 matches expected Dr Retained earnings 500000 / Cr Dividends payable 500000; Dividends (temporary equity account reducing retained earnings) is semantically equivalent to debiting Retained earnings directly.

basic_11_convert_preferred_to_common.reason: Actual: Dr Preferred Shares 100 / Cr Common Shares 100 matches expected Dr Share capital — Preferred 100 / Cr Share capital — Common 100; semantically equivalent.

basic_12_pay_salaries.reason: Actual: Dr Salaries Expense 100 / Cr Cash 100 matches expected exactly; semantically equivalent account names.

basic_13_accrue_utility.reason: Actual: Dr Utilities Expense 50 / Cr Accounts Payable 50 matches expected Dr Utilities expense 50 / Cr Accrued liabilities 50; Accounts Payable is a reasonable substitute for Accrued liabilities in accrual context.

basic_14_casualty_loss.reason: Actual: Dr Loss on Inventory Destruction 2000 / Cr Inventory 2000 matches expected Dr Casualty loss 2000 / Cr Inventories — Merchandise 2000; semantically equivalent loss and inventory accounts.

basic_15_no_entry.reason: Both actual and expected journal entries are null; no entry required for board resolution with no financial impact.

int_03_machinery_purchase.reason: Actual: Dr Machinery 800000, Cr Accounts Payable 700000, Cr Cash 100000 matches expected; correctly capitalizes freight/installation/testing into PP&E.

int_04_major_overhaul.reason: Actual: Dr Machinery 200000 / Cr Cash 200000 matches expected Dr PP&E — Machinery 200000 / Cr Cash 200000; correctly capitalizes overhaul extending useful life.

int_05_bond_issuance_discount.reason: Actual Cash debit is 2657687 but expected is 2657510; Discount on Bonds Payable is 342313 vs expected 342490. The PV calculation differs slightly (likely rounding method difference), producing a $177 discrepancy.

int_06_warranty_provision.reason: Actual: Dr Warranty Expense 900000 / Cr Warranty Liability 900000 matches expected Dr Warranty expense 900000 / Cr Provision for warranties 900000; correct expected value calculation (20%*2M + 5%*10M = 900K).

int_07_decommissioning_provision.reason: Actual: Dr Marine Structure 5950000, Cr Accounts Payable 4000000, Cr Asset Retirement Obligation 1950000 matches expected; Marine Structure = PP&E — Marine structures, ARO = Decommissioning provision.

int_08_share_repurchase_cancel.reason: Actual debits Additional Paid-in Capital 10000 for the excess over par, but expected debits Retained earnings 10000; the excess payment on share cancellation should be charged to Retained earnings per IFRS, not APIC.

int_09_merchandise_with_costs.reason: Actual: Dr Inventory 1150000, Dr Storage Expense 20000, Dr Freight-Out Expense 50000, Cr Accounts Payable 1000000, Cr Cash 220000 matches expected; Storage Expense = Warehousing expense, Freight-Out Expense = Distribution costs.

int_10_prepayment.reason: Actual: Dr Prepaid Inventory 1000000 / Cr Cash 1000000 matches expected Dr Prepayments 1000000 / Cr Cash 1000000; Prepaid Inventory is semantically equivalent to Prepayments in this context.

int_11_land_instalment_discount.reason: Actual records only Dr Land 49173240 / Cr Long-term Notes Payable 49173240 at the PV amount, omitting the Discount on long-term payables account. Expected has 3 lines: Dr Land 49173000, Dr Discount 10827000, Cr Long-term payables 60000000. The gross method with discount is required, not the net method.

int_12_site_improvements.reason: Actual combines both items into one Dr Land Improvements 4110000 account instead of separating into Dr PP&E — Site improvements 1750000 and Dr Land 2360000 as expected; permanent landscaping should be classified as Land, not site improvements.

int_13_donation_note.reason: Actual: Dr Charitable Contributions Expense 1000000 / Cr Notes Payable 1000000 matches expected; Charitable Contributions Expense = Donations expense.

int_14_vehicle_mixed_payment.reason: Actual: Dr Delivery Vehicle 40000, Cr Cash 20000, Cr Notes Payable 20000 matches expected; Delivery Vehicle = PP&E — Vehicles.

int_15_bank_loan.reason: Actual: Dr Cash 200000 / Cr Notes Payable 200000 matches expected Dr Cash 200000 / Cr Long-term borrowings 200000; Notes Payable is semantically equivalent to Long-term borrowings for a 3-year bank loan.

int_17_customer_deposit.reason: Actual: Dr Chequing Account 5000 / Cr Unearned Revenue 5000 matches expected Dr Cash — chequing 5000 / Cr Contract liabilities 5000; Chequing Account = Cash — chequing, Unearned Revenue = Contract liabilities.

int_18_multiple_assets.reason: Actual splits into 3 debit lines (Office Furniture 2000, Computer Equipment 3500, Vehicles 250000) while expected combines desks+computers into one PP&E — Office equipment 5500 debit. Expected has 2 asset debits, actual has 3; line count differs though total amounts balance.

int_19_service_revenue_cash.reason: Actual: Dr Cash 25500 / Cr Service Revenue 25500 matches expected Dr Cash 25500 / Cr Revenue — Service revenue 25500.

int_20_service_revenue_credit.reason: Actual: Dr Accounts Receivable 31500 / Cr Service Revenue 31500 matches expected Dr Trade receivables 31500 / Cr Revenue — Service revenue 31500.

int_21_rd_expense.reason: Actual: Dr Research and Development Expense 50000 / Cr Cash 50000 matches expected; Cash used instead of Cash — chequing is acceptable since both represent cash payment by cheque.

int_22_compound_sale_with_tax.reason: Actual: Dr Cash 45900, Dr Accounts Receivable 30000, Dr Cost of Goods Sold 55500, Cr Sales Revenue 69000, Cr Sales Tax Payable 6900, Cr Inventory 55500 matches expected exactly in amounts and structure.

int_23_split_electricity.reason: Actual debits Factory Electricity Expense 15000 (an expense account) instead of expected Work in process — Manufacturing overhead 15000 (an asset/WIP account); factory overhead should be capitalized into WIP, not expensed directly.

int_24_advertising.reason: Actual splits into Dr Marketing Expense 19469.03 and Dr HST Recoverable 2530.97, Cr Cash 22000. Expected has Dr Advertising expense 22000 / Cr Cash 22000 with tax included in expense. The difference is solely tax treatment (extracting HST/ITC separately vs bundling).

int_25_building_purchase_allocation.reason: Actual: Dr Land 6000000, Dr Building 3000000, Dr HST Recoverable 300000, Cr Cash 4800000, Cr Accounts Payable 4500000 matches expected allocation and tax treatment exactly.

int_26a_payroll_recognition.reason: Actual debits Production Wages Expense 25000 (an expense) instead of expected Work in process — Direct labour 25000 (an asset/WIP); production worker wages should be capitalized into WIP, not expensed. Also splits withholdings into 4 separate liability lines vs expected single Statutory withholdings payable line, though that is acceptable granularity.

int_26b_payroll_remittance.reason: Actual has 4 debit lines totaling 14050 (Pension 4000, Health 6500, EI 2100, Income Tax 1450) all as liability reductions and Cr Cash 14050, but expected separates into Dr Statutory withholdings payable 7750 (liability) + Dr Employee benefits expense 6300 (expense for employer matching) + Cr Cash 14050. Actual fails to distinguish employee withholdings (7750) from employer matching contributions (6300), treating all as liability reversals.

int_28_promotional_literature.reason: Actual: Dr Marketing Expense 7000 / Cr Cash 7000 matches expected Dr Advertising expense 7000 / Cr Cash 7000; Marketing Expense is semantically equivalent to Advertising expense for promotional materials.

int_29_security_deposit_received.reason: Actual: Dr Cash 25000 / Cr Security Deposit Liability 25000 matches expected Dr Cash 25000 / Cr Rental deposits received 25000; semantically equivalent.

int_30_short_term_loan_advance.reason: Actual: Dr Loan Receivable - Short-term 2000000 / Cr Chequing Account 2000000 matches expected Dr Short-term loans receivable 2000000 / Cr Cash — chequing 2000000.

int_31_vehicle_nonrecoverable_tax.reason: Actual: Dr Vehicle 52800 / Cr Dealer Financing Payable 52800 matches expected Dr PP&E — Vehicles 52800 / Cr Other payables 52800; correctly capitalizes non-recoverable tax into asset cost.

int_hard_01a_note_derecognition.reason: Actual: Dr Cash 98356.16, Dr Loss on Discounting of Note 1643.84, Cr Notes Receivable 100000 matches expected (expected Cash 98356, Loss 1644, Cr Trade receivables 100000); amounts differ by rounding ($0.16) which is negligible, and Notes Receivable = Trade receivables in this context since the note replaced a trade receivable.

int_hard_01b_note_collateralized.reason: Actual credits Notes Payable - Discounted Notes 100000, which is semantically close to Short-term borrowings, but actual debits Financing Expense 1643.84 instead of Interest expense 1644. More importantly, the credit account 'Notes Payable - Discounted Notes' is acceptable as Short-term borrowings. The amounts differ by $0.16 rounding. Overall the structure matches but naming Financing Expense vs Interest expense is borderline; accepting as match since financing expense is semantically equivalent to interest expense in this context.

int_hard_02a_investment_fvtpl.reason: Actual: Dr FVTPL Financial Assets - Ford Shares 3000000, Dr Transaction Costs Expense 100000, Cr Cash 3100000 matches expected exactly; correctly expenses transaction costs for FVTPL classification.

int_hard_02b_investment_fvoci.reason: Actual: Dr Investment in Ford Shares - FVOCI 3100000 / Cr Cash 3100000 matches expected Dr Financial assets at FVOCI 3100000 / Cr Cash 3100000; correctly capitalizes transaction costs for FVOCI.

int_hard_02c_investment_equity_method.reason: Actual: Dr Investment in Associate - Ford 3100000 / Cr Cash 3100000 matches expected Dr Investment in associate 3100000 / Cr Cash 3100000.

int_hard_16a_rent_prepaid.reason: Actual: Dr Prepaid Rent 24000 / Cr Cash 24000 matches expected Dr Prepaid rent 24000 / Cr Cash — chequing 24000; Cash vs Cash — chequing is acceptable.

int_hard_16b_rent_expense.reason: Actual: Dr Rent Expense 24000 / Cr Cash 24000 matches expected Dr Rent expense 24000 / Cr Cash — chequing 24000; Cash vs Cash — chequing is acceptable.

int_hard_27a_meal_overtime.reason: Actual: Dr Employee Meals Expense 125 / Cr Credit Card Payable 125 matches expected Dr Employee benefits expense 125 / Cr Credit card payable 125; Employee Meals Expense is semantically equivalent to Employee benefits expense in this overtime meal context.

int_hard_27b_meal_meeting.reason: Actual: Dr Meals and Entertainment Expense 125 / Cr Credit Card Payable 125 matches expected Dr Meeting expense 125 / Cr Credit card payable 125; while Meals and Entertainment is broader than Meeting expense, both are expense accounts and the amounts match.

int_hard_27c_meal_entertainment.reason: Actual: Dr Meals and Entertainment Expense 125 / Cr Credit Card Payable 125 matches expected Dr Entertainment expense 125 / Cr Credit card payable 125; Meals and Entertainment Expense is semantically equivalent to Entertainment expense.

int_hard_27d_meal_factory.reason: Actual: Dr Manufacturing Overhead 125 / Cr Credit Card Payable 125 matches expected Dr Work in process — Manufacturing overhead 125 / Cr Credit card payable 125; Manufacturing Overhead = Work in process — Manufacturing overhead.

int_hard_32a_grocery_entertainment.reason: Actual separates Dr Meals and Entertainment Expense 1200 + Dr HST Recoverable 120 / Cr Credit Card Payable 1320, while expected bundles tax into Dr Entertainment expense 1320 / Cr Credit card payable 1320. The difference is solely tax treatment (extracting HST separately).

int_hard_32b_grocery_breakroom.reason: Actual separates Dr Office Supplies Expense 1200 + Dr HST Recoverable 120 / Cr Credit Card Payable 1320, while expected bundles tax into Dr Employee benefits expense 1320 / Cr Credit card payable 1320. Different tax treatment and Office Supplies Expense vs Employee benefits expense is a substantive account name difference.
